product_overview: DyslexiaLens is a web application that helps users detect potential dyslexia from uploaded images and provides a dyslexia-friendly experience with accessibility controls, profile management, and history tracking. It also offers authentication, usage guidance, and support content for a complete user workflow.
core_goals: Create an account and sign in to access personal features
Upload handwritten or image samples for AI-based dyslexia detection or handwriting translation
Review analysis results and generated recommendations
Manage saved profile details and address information
Browse, search, filter, and remove past analysis history
Customize the interface for dyslexia-friendly reading and reduced visual strain
Learn how to use the app through help, tips, and FAQ content

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Provides the public home experience with product introduction, benefits, testimonials, and calls to action for new users.
user_flows: Navigate to the home page -> Review the product introduction -> Explore the problem and solution content -> Read the highlighted features -> Browse testimonials -> Choose a call to action to begin using the app

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Lets users create an account, sign in, and recover access to their account through password reset steps.
user_flows: Navigate to the registration page -> Enter account details -> Submit the registration form -> See confirmation that the account was created -> Navigate to the login page -> Enter email and password -> Submit the login form -> Enter the app
Navigate to the login page -> Enter email and password -> Submit the login form -> See an invalid credentials message

Navigate to the forgot password page -> Enter the account email -> Request a password reset -> Enter the received OTP -> Verify the OTP -> Set a new password -> Submit the reset form -> See password reset confirmation

features.name: File Upload & AI Analysis
features.description: Allows authenticated users to upload an image for dyslexia detection or handwriting translation and then review the resulting AI output.
user_flows: Navigate to the upload page -> Choose an image file -> Submit the upload for dyslexia detection -> See the analyzing page -> Review the result page with detection probability, severity, and recommendations

Navigate to the upload page -> Choose an image file -> Submit the upload for handwriting translation -> See the analyzing page -> Review the result page with the extracted source text and translated text
Navigate to the upload page -> Submit without choosing a file -> See a validation message that a file is required
Navigate to the upload page -> Enter optional practice text settings -> Request a generated practice sentence -> Receive a generated sentence for writing practice

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: Allows users to view and update personal information, address details, and password settings.
user_flows: Navigate to the profile page -> Review saved personal information and address details -> Open the personal information edit page -> Update editable profile fields -> Save the changes -> See the updated profile data
Navigate to the profile page -> Open the address edit page -> Update city, postal code, or country -> Save the changes -> See the updated address information

Navigate to the profile page -> Open the password change page -> Enter the current credentials and required verification information -> Submit the password change request -> See password change confirmation
Navigate to the personal information edit page -> Try to change the email address -> See that the email field cannot be edited

features.name: History Management
features.description: Enables users to review their previous analysis records, refine the list with search and filters, and delete entries they no longer need.
user_flows: Navigate to the history page -> View the full list of past analysis records -> Search or filter the records -> Open a matching result from the list
Navigate to the history page -> View a specific history record -> Delete the selected record -> See the record removed from the list
Navigate to the history page -> Choose to clear all visible history records -> Confirm the deletion action -> See the history list emptied

features.name: Accessibility Settings
features.description: Provides interface controls that make the app easier to read and use for dyslexic users or users sensitive to motion.
user_flows: Navigate to the accessibility settings page -> Turn on high contrast mode -> Enable the dyslexia-friendly font -> Increase or decrease text size -> Turn on reduce motion -> See the interface update to the chosen accessibility preferences

features.name: Help & Tips
features.description: Offers guidance for taking suitable photos, answering common questions, and downloading helpful writing templates or disclaimers.
user_flows: Navigate to the help page -> Read the FAQ and usage guidance -> Review writing tips -> Download the available template or reference material
Navigate to the photo tips page -> Review the step-by-step photo guidance -> Return to the help content to continue learning how to use the app

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Home page with hero, problem/solution sections, features, testimonials, and CTAs

features.description: Login, registration, and forgot password flows

known_limitations.issue: Email field is read-only on edit profile page
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot change their email address

known_limitations.issue: Export PDF shows placeholder toast only
known_limitations.impact: PDF export feature not yet implemented
Unauthenticated users can navigate to auth-required pages (though components handle gracefully)

known_limitations.issue: History clear-all fires Promise.all on all items simultaneously
known_limitations.impact: Could overwhelm server with many concurrent DELETE requests

known_limitations.issue: Analyzing page has hardcoded 2-minute progress simulation
known_limitations.impact: Progress does not reflect actual API progress

known_limitations.issue: Multiple localStorage keys for user data (user vs dyslexialens-user)
known_limitations.impact: Keys may get out of sync

known_limitations.issue: No pagination on history API - fetches all records at once
